hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const ts=new Date().toLocaleString('sv',{timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata'}).replace(' ','T').replace(/[:.]/g,'-');const dir='thoughts/handoffs';try{fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});}catch(e){}const log=fs.existsSync('.claude/tool.log')?fs.readFileSync('.claude/tool.log','utf8').split('
').slice(-30).join('
'):'no tool.log';const cwd=process.cwd().replace(/\/g,'/');const projKey='d-'+cwd.replace(/[:/]/g,'-').replace(/^-+/,'');const memPath='C:/Users/kumar/.claude/projects/'+projKey+'/memory/MEMORY.md';const mem=fs.existsSync(memPath)?fs.readFileSync(memPath,'utf8'):'no memory at '+memPath;const handoff='# Auto-Handoff '+ts+'
